title: Add Updates to Item Card
excerpt: it would be great if you could add updates as a widget to an item card in work management similar to how it is on the CRM platform

posts.author: mckensie.east (McKensie East)
posts.cookedHtml: it would be great if you could add updates as a widget to an item card in work management similar to how it is on the CRM platform

posts.author: MortenN (Morten Nielsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Completely agree!
Being able to have Updates as a widget on an Item Card would be fantastic and make it possible to tailor it to exactly what your needs are.

On the Monday CRM Product item views this would be fantastic as well
